creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 3.4.2.0, which allows us to get rid of some patches in files/.
- Reinstate MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE; qmake is not very good at handling this, and the way QCad uses qmake makes things even worse.

Port maintainer (mr@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
